features.description: rbac_size and config_size fields added to BackupManifest and BackupSummary with serde backward compatibility

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -n 'pub rbac_size: u64' src/manifest.rs && grep -n 'pub config_size: u64' src/manifest.rs && grep -n 'pub rbac_size: u64' src/list.rs && grep -n 'pub config_size: u64' src/list.rs
layers.fail_message: rbac_size or config_size fields missing from BackupManifest or BackupSummary

layers.name: compilation
layers.command: cargo check 2>&1 | tail -1
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors after adding manifest fields

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test test_manifest_rbac_config_size_fields test_manifest_backward_compat_no_rbac_config_size -- --exact 2>&1 | grep -c 'test result: ok'
layers.fail_message: Manifest field tests failed

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Pure data structure change with serde defaults; no runtime behavior beyond serialization tested in behavioral layer

alternative_verification.command: cargo test test_manifest_rbac_config_size_fields test_manifest_backward_compat_no_rbac_config_size -- --exact 2>&1 | grep 'test result: ok'

features.description: dir_size() made public and rbac_size/config_size computed during backup::create()

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -n 'pub fn dir_size' src/backup/collect.rs && grep -n 'rbac_size' src/backup/mod.rs && grep -n 'config_size' src/backup/mod.rs
layers.expected: 3 lines (pub fn, rbac_size assignment, config_size assignment)
layers.fail_message: dir_size not public or size computation missing from backup::create()

layers.name: compilation
layers.command: cargo check 2>&1 | tail -1
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors after adding size computation

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test test_dir_size_empty_dir test_dir_size_with_files -- --exact 2>&1 | grep -c 'test result: ok'
layers.fail_message: dir_size unit tests failed

layers.name: runtime
layers.fail_message: rbac_size/config_size not logged during backup creation

features.description: ListResponse.rbac_size and .config_size populated from BackupSummary instead of hardcoded 0

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -n 'rbac_size: s.rbac_size' src/server/routes.rs && grep -n 'config_size: s.config_size' src/server/routes.rs
layers.fail_message: summary_to_list_response still hardcodes 0 for rbac_size or config_size

layers.name: compilation
layers.command: cargo check 2>&1 | tail -1
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors after wiring sizes

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test test_summary_to_list_response_sizes -- --exact 2>&1 | grep 'test result: ok'
layers.fail_message: summary_to_list_response sizes test failed

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Field propagation verified by unit test; runtime evidence provided by F002 which populates the source data

alternative_verification.command: cargo test test_summary_to_list_response_sizes -- --exact 2>&1 | grep 'test result: ok'

features.description: Tables API endpoint supports offset/limit pagination query parameters

features.description: ManifestCache struct with TTL-based expiry for remote backup summaries

features.description: SIGQUIT handler dumps stack trace to stderr in server and standalone watch modes

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -n 'SignalKind::quit' src/server/mod.rs && grep -n 'SignalKind::quit' src/main.rs
layers.fail_message: SIGQUIT handler not registered in server/mod.rs or main.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.command: cargo check 2>&1 | tail -1
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors in SIGQUIT handler

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: grep -n 'SIGQUIT received' src/server/mod.rs && grep -n 'Backtrace::force_capture' src/server/mod.rs
layers.fail_message: SIGQUIT log message or backtrace capture missing from handler code

layers.name: runtime
layers.fail_message: SIGQUIT handler did not fire when kill -3 sent to process

features.description: CLAUDE.md updated for all modified modules (src/server, src/upload, src/backup)
